response.justification: The candidate is a highly experienced full-stack and polyglot developer but lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of hands-on C++ experience on Windows required for this role. Their professional C/C++ experience is limited to roughly six months nearly a decade ago, and their financial domain exposure is brief and not aligned with core capital markets or fixed income systems.
strengths: Extensive overall software engineering experience spanning over 15 years across diverse tech stacks.
Possesses some investment domain exposure from their tenure at RIDE Capital.
Strong background in CI/CD pipelines, testing frameworks, and DevOps practices.
concerns: Lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of hands-on C++ development experience, with only ~6 months recorded professionally.
No demonstrated experience developing C++ applications specifically on the Windows platform.
Lacks deep expertise in Capital Markets, Fixed Income, and enterprise SQL Server/Oracle database management.
